meta.title: Colin Bossu Réaubourg
meta.description: Portfolio and homepage of Colin Bossu Réaubourg (Wartets). Exploration of works in mathematics, physics, software engineering, and acoustic creations.

hero.title: Colin Bossu Réaubourg
hero.subtitle: aka Wartets
hero.description: Interactive simulations, physics research, software engineering, and digital creations.

about.title: About
about.p1: Currently a third-year Physics undergraduate student at Université Paris Cité, my work focuses on natural phenomena modeling, high-performance numerical simulation, and scientific computing. I develop physics engines and virtual analysis environments designed to simulate complex systems.
about.p2: My areas of interest include quantum mechanics, fluid dynamics, and statistical physics. I have contributed to activities at the Materials and Quantum Phenomena Laboratory and am involved in the dissemination of scientific knowledge through the Vice Presidency of the Phisis Association.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.programming_desc: Python, JavaScript, C++20, WebGL2/OpenGL, LaTeX, Git, Linux/Windows/MacOS, Docker, CI/CD
skills.science_desc: Numerical modeling (LBM, Lenia, Barnes-Hut), Raman spectroscopy, use of AlGaAs entangled photon sources, data analysis, scientific visualization
skills.music_desc: Composition, acoustics, musical training (Éric Satie Conservatory, 2011-2019)

music_section.title: Music Space
music_section.description: Selection of acoustic and electroacoustic works structured around algorithmic frameworks, signal processing, and frequency synthesis.
